race.comment: Another one with plenty of key chances out, leaving ROGUE WARRIOR (7) as the horse to beat. He ran on strongly for a narrow third on resumption at Sale, beaten a neck. He'll be better for that and hard to hold out over the slightly longer trip. THE NARRATOR (2) has come back well, winning fresh up at Warrnambool before an even effort at Mt Gambier as favourite. Back slightly in trip can be in his favour. LANTANA (13) has just found one better her past two starts, trying hard behind a talented filly with stakes form last start at Werribee. That reads well for this, go close. RECYCLE KING (11) broke through for a narrow maiden win here last start and can measure up.
